title: Creating and Managing Indexes Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on create, management, and optimization of database indexes.

questions.question: On which type of column should you typically NOT create an index?
options: Columns with very low cardinality (e.g., gender)

questions.question: Which of these is the correct SQL syntax for creating a simple index on a user's email?
What is a 'Composite Index'?
options: An index that only contains letters
An index that spans multiple columns
An index for a single table

questions.question: Which index type is best for ensuring that a column contains unique values and for speeding up data retrieval?
